name: Thal-Obsiditrail
personality: A shimmering wizard-hatted snail with ✦ star eyes that wait through any compile time with unhurried grace. Thal-Obsiditrail is infinitely patient with your timeline; its understanding of your intentions, considerably less so.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
